tooltip.设置_AI_接口_用哪块屏幕识图_弹幕样式_以及截图与压缩参数_改完后点_保存: Set AI API, capture display, danmu style, and screenshot/compression. Click Save settings to apply.
tooltip.API_与模型_麦克风模式_AI读弹幕_弹幕显示_识图区域_识图清晰度_字体设: API & model, mic mode, AI danmu reader, danmu display, capture region, capture quality, and font settings. For persona and prompts, go to Persona Studio.
tooltip.请先在_温馨控制台_开始或停止弹幕_API_密钥留空保存不会改掉旧密钥_默认识: Start or stop danmu in Dashboard first; blank API key on save won't overwrite existing key; default capture is fullscreen on selected display—drag a sub-region in Capture region; Model profiles can have separate endpoint and key.
tooltip.设置_AI_接口_用哪块屏幕识图_弹幕样式_以及: Set AI API, capture display, danmu style, and screenshot/compression. Click Save settings to apply.
tooltip.API_与模型_麦克风模式_AI读弹幕_弹幕显示: API & model, mic mode, AI danmu reader, danmu display, capture region, capture quality, and font settings. For persona and prompts, go to Persona Studio.
tooltip.请先在_温馨控制台_开始或停止弹幕_API_密钥: Start or stop danmu in Dashboard first; blank API key on save won't overwrite existing key; default capture is fullscreen on selected display—drag a sub-region in Capture region; Model profiles can have separate endpoint and key.
